items.title_en: UK inflation jumps to 3.3% in March as fuel prices surge amid Iran war
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争期间燃料价格飙升，英国3月份通胀率跃升至3.3%
items.desc_en: Fuel prices saw their largest increase for over three years, the ONS' chief economist said.
items.desc_zh: 英国国家统计局首席经济学家表示，燃油价格出现三年多以来最大涨幅。

items.title_en: European stocks set to open lower as Trump refuses to lift Strait of Hormuz blockade
items.title_zh: 由于特朗普拒绝解除霍尔木兹海峡封锁，欧洲股市开盘走低
items.desc_en: European stocks are expected to open in negative territory on Wednesday as traders assess the Iran ceasefire extension and prospect of peace talks.
items.desc_zh: 由于交易员评估伊朗停火延期以及和平谈判的前景，预计欧洲股市周三开盘下跌。

items.title_en: CEO with over $3 trillion under management tells Gen-Z to think past ‘hobby investing’
items.title_zh: 管理着超过 3 万亿美元的首席执行官告诉 Z 世代要思考过去的“爱好投资”
items.desc_en: The comments come against a backdrop of deepening disillusionment among younger investors and rising mistrust in wealth management institutions.
items.desc_zh: 这些言论是在年轻投资者的幻灭感加深以及对财富管理机构的不信任感日益增强的背景下发表的。

items.title_en: Hormuz is just a ‘dry run’ if China and U.S. go to war in the Pacific, Singapore foreign minister warns
items.title_zh: 新加坡外长警告称，如果中美在太平洋地区开战，霍尔木兹海峡只是一场“预演”
items.desc_en: Balakrishnan was discussing the complexities of the U.S.- China relationship from Singapore's perspective with CNBC's Steve Sedgwick at the CONVERGE LIVE event.
items.desc_zh: 巴拉克里希南在 CONVERGE LIVE 活动上与 CNBC 的史蒂夫·塞奇威克 (Steve Sedgwick) 从新加坡的角度讨论了美中关系的复杂性。

items.desc_zh: 由于美伊冲突轨迹仍存在不确定性，周三油价小幅走低。

items.desc_en: Asia markets open broadly lower Wednesday, as uncertainty deepened over the Middle East conflict even as Trump extended a temporary ceasefire.
items.desc_zh: 周三亚洲市场开盘普遍走低，尽管特朗普延长了临时停火协议，但中东冲突的不确定性仍在加深。

items.title_en: SpaceX says it can buy Cursor later this year for $60 billion or pay $10 billion for 'our work together'
items.title_zh: SpaceX 表示，它可能会在今年晚些时候以 600 亿美元收购 Cursor，或者为“我们的合作”支付 100 亿美元
items.desc_en: SpaceX said it's obtained the rights to buy coding startup Cursor for $60 billion later this year or pay $10 billion for the work they're doing together.
items.desc_zh: SpaceX 表示，它已获得在今年晚些时候以 600 亿美元收购编码初创公司 Cursor 的权利，或者为他们正在合作的工作支付 100 亿美元。

items.title_zh: Meta 跟踪工人的点击和击键以训练人工智能
items.desc_en: The firm will take data from the way employees work for its artificial intelligence models.
items.desc_zh: 该公司将从员工的工作方式中获取数据用于其人工智能模型。

items.title_en: Apple's elevation of silicon head Johny Srouji signals sprint to build in-house chips for all devices
items.title_zh: 苹果任命约翰尼·斯鲁吉 (Johny Srouji) 为芯片负责人，标志着苹果公司将开始为所有设备打造内部芯片
items.desc_en: With the promotion of silicon head Johny Srouji to hardware boss, Apple is showing urgency its its effort to make custom chips for all iPhones and Macs.
items.desc_zh: 随着硅负责人 Johny Srouji 晋升为硬件主管，苹果公司显示出为所有 iPhone 和 Mac 生产定制芯片的紧迫性。

items.title_en: AI hacking tools like Mythos can be 'net positive' says top cyber official
items.title_zh: 高级网络官员表示，像 Mythos 这样的人工智能黑客工具可能具有“净积极性”
items.desc_en: The head of the National Cyber Security Centre says frontier AI tools can be a force for good - if kept out of the wrong hands.
items.desc_zh: 国家网络安全中心负责人表示，前沿人工智能工具如果不落入坏人之手，可以成为一股正义的力量。

items.title_en: These stocks may rip if the Iran conflict is resolved, UBS says
items.title_zh: 瑞银表示，如果伊朗冲突得到解决，这些股票可能会下跌
items.desc_en: The bank quantified the impact on individual stocks of the Iran war using a scoring system. Some companies stand to be ceasefire winners.
items.desc_zh: 该银行使用评分系统量化了伊朗战争对个股的影响。一些公司有望成为停火赢家。

items.desc_en: Trump said he was "not happy with the Supreme Court" for ruling IEEPA tariffs were illegal, and for not allowing the U.S. to keep tariffs already collected.

items.title_en: Unprecedented ruling finds Hungary's anti-LGBTQ laws in breach of EU values
items.title_zh: 史无前例的裁决发现匈牙利的反 LGBTQ 法律违反了欧盟价值观

items.desc_zh: 欧盟最高法院认为，这些改革在多个层面上违反了欧盟价值观，并违反了欧盟条约的基本价值观。

items.desc_en: US envoy Steve Witkoff and Donald Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner have travelled to Moscow several times, but never to Kyiv.
items.desc_zh: 美国特使史蒂夫·威特科夫和唐纳德·特朗普的女婿贾里德·库什纳曾多次前往莫斯科，但从未去过基辅。

items.title_en: How will Apple change under 'product guy' John Ternus?
items.title_zh: 在“产品人”约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 的领导下，苹果将如何改变？
items.desc_en: As Tim Cook announces his departure from the top job at Apple, these are the key challenges for new boss John Ternus.
items.desc_zh: 随着蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 宣布辞去苹果公司最高职位，这些都是新任老板约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 面临的主要挑战。

items.title_en: Arrests in Nigeria after abduction of local monarch 'held for ransom'
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚当地君主被绑架“勒索赎金”后被捕
items.desc_en: The kidnappers raided his palace on Saturday and are believed to be holding him in a forest.
items.desc_zh: 绑匪周六袭击了他的宫殿，据信将他关押在森林里。

items.title_en: Madonna offers reward for return of missing Coachella costume
items.title_zh: 麦当娜悬赏归还丢失的科切拉服装
items.desc_en: The items, which she says are "part of my history", disappeared after her slot with Sabrina Carpenter.
items.desc_zh: 她说这些物品是“我历史的一部分”，但在她与萨布丽娜·卡彭特 (Sabrina Carpenter) 交往后就消失了。

items.title_en: Japan loosens arms export rules in break from post-WW2 pacifism
items.title_zh: 日本放宽武器出口规则，打破二战后和平主义
items.desc_en: This clears the way for Japan to sell weapons to more than a dozen countries.
items.desc_zh: 这为日本向十多个国家出售武器扫清了道路。

items.title_en: Apple incoming CEO John Ternus faces a defining challenge: Fixing the company's AI strategy
items.title_zh: 苹果即将上任的首席执行官 John Ternus 面临着一个决定性的挑战：修正公司的人工智能战略
items.desc_en: Tim Cook had a highly successful tenure as Apple's CEO, but he leaves his successor with a big gap to fill when it comes to the company's position in AI.
items.desc_zh: 蒂姆·库克作为苹果首席执行官的任期非常成功，但在公司在人工智能领域的地位方面，他留给继任者一个巨大的空白需要填补。

items.title_zh: 加拿大人在墨西哥古特奥蒂瓦坎金字塔枪击事件中丧生
items.desc_en: Several people were also injured in the incident on Monday at the popular tourist site, say Mexican officials.
items.desc_zh: 墨西哥官员称，周一在这个热门旅游景点发生的事件中，还有多人受伤。

items.desc_zh: 随着库克出任执行董事长，约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus) 将接管这家科技巨头的运营。

items.desc_zh: 亚马逊亿万富翁杰夫·贝索斯创立的公司正在调查此次失败的发射。

items.title_en: US singer D4vd charged with murder stemming from death of missing teenage girl
items.title_zh: 美国歌手 D4vd 因失踪少女死亡被控谋杀
items.desc_en: Prosecutors say he could face life in prison due to special circumstances surrounding the girl's disappearance and death.
items.desc_zh: 检察官表示，由于女孩失踪和死亡的特殊情况，他可能面临终身监禁。

items.desc_zh: 该技术旨在识别人们的虹膜并阻止虚假账户和恶意诈骗的兴起。
